description: iOS SwiftUI 문제 렌더링 후속 보강. 기존 ios-question-rendering-parity 위에 보기 compact code mode, image/photo/SVG graph, table parser/layout, 결과/오답/즐겨찾기 채택, 줄바꿈 fixture 검증을 추가한다. API/문제 데이터/backend/frontend/Android 변경 없음.

dependency_graph.step_1: round-1, parallel with step_2 and step_3, owns code block/option renderer surface
dependency_graph.step_2: round-1, parallel with step_1 and step_3, owns image/SVG renderer
dependency_graph.step_3: round-1, parallel with step_1 and step_2, owns table parser/layout
dependency_graph.step_4: round-2, depends on step_1~3, adopts renderer in result/wrong-answer/bookmark screens
dependency_graph.step_5: round-2, depends on step_4, line-break fixture hardening
dependency_graph.step_6: round-3, depends on step_1~5, macOS build/simulator verification

parallel_plan: Round 1: Step 1/2/3 run in parallel by sub-agents with non-overlapping write sets.
Round 2: Main agent integrates QuestionContentView and screen adoption after renderer pieces land.
Round 3: macOS Xcode build and simulator visual verification.

steps.name: renderer-api-and-option-code-mode
steps.description: QuestionContentView/CodeBlockView/AppOptionRow에 보기용 compact/bare code block surface를 적용한다.
steps.summary: CodeBlockSurface card/bare 추가, QuestionContentView codeBlockSurface 파라미터 통합, AppOptionRow 보기 렌더링은 bare code block surface 사용.

steps.name: image-svg-photo-rendering
steps.description: 문제 본문 이미지, 사진, data URI, inline/remote SVG graph 렌더링을 보강한다.
steps.summary: InlineSVGView full-width/min-height/aspect-ratio 보강, RemoteQuestionImageView 신규 추가, QuestionContentView image segment 연동.

steps.name: table-parser-and-layout-alignment
steps.description: GFM table escaped pipe/parser와 모바일 table layout 줄맞춤을 보강한다.
steps.summary: GFM table line scanner, escaped pipe 보존, delimiter 검증, fenced-code skip, stable width/horizontal scroll table UI 적용.

steps.name: screen-adoption-audit
steps.description: 결과/오답/즐겨찾기 화면에서 본문·보기·해설을 공통 렌더러로 채택한다.
steps.summary: AnswerReviewRow가 본문/보기/단답/해설을 렌더링하도록 확장, PastExamResultView/SolveResultView metadata 전달, WrongAnswerRetrySheet 실제 보기 렌더링, 목록 preview helper 적용.

steps.name: linebreak-fixture-hardening
steps.description: 보기 마커와 코드/문단 줄바꿈 fixture를 점검하고 파싱 경로를 normalized content 기준으로 통일한다.
steps.summary: QuestionParser.parseNormalized 추가 및 solve/solo/option/detail/retry/result 경로 적용, code fence 경계 공백 trimming 완화, markdown image segment 지원.

steps.name: ios-build-and-visual-verification
steps.description: macOS에서 xcodebuild와 simulator screenshot으로 문제/보기/해설/결과/오답/즐겨찾기/SVG/image/table/Dynamic Type을 검증한다.
steps.blocked_reason: 현재 세션은 Windows sandbox이며 ios/AGENTS.md가 iOS 빌드/시뮬레이터 검증은 macOS 셸에서만 수행하라고 명시한다.
